violations.text: The non-food contact surfaces of the 2 door lowboy has an accumulation of debris and water on bottom shelf. New Violation. Correct By: 04/16/2024

The floor tiles by the back door and several throughout the kitchen and dining room area is in poor repair. The physical facilities must be maintained in good repair. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 06/02/2024
Fan guard missing in walk-in cooler. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 03/27/2024
The non-food contact surfaces of the dough mixer and flour bin have an accumulation of dust, dirt, food residue, and other debris. Corrected On-Site. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 12/27/2023

The floor tiles by the back door and several throughout the kitchen and dining room area is in poor repair. The physical facilities must be maintained in good repair. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 03/27/2024

The quaternary ammonium concentration in the sanitizing solution of the 3-bay sink was 100 parts per million (ppm). According to the manufacturer's use directions, the concentration of the quaternary ammonium must be 200-400 ppm. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 11/24/2023

Food contact surfaces of equipment/utensils (slicer) were observed with an accumulation of food and debris. The food contact surfaces of equipment must be clean to sight and touch. New Violation. Correct By: 11/24/2023

The doors to the outside, located in the back and side, are not tight-fitting. Outer openings of a food establishment must be protected against the entry of insects and rodents by tight-fitting doors. New Violation. Correct By: 12/08/2023

The presence of large rodents is not controlled as evidenced by droppings throughout the establishment. The presence of insects, rodents, and other pests must be controlled by routinely inspecting the premises for evidence of pests, using acceptable methods to control pests, eliminating harborage conditions, and routinely inspecting incoming shipments of food and supplies. New Violation. Correct By: 11/24/2023
Refrigerator door gaskets observed in poor repair at prep unit and Coca-Cola refrigerator. New Violation. Correct By: 12/08/2023
Fixture on slicer observed in poor repair. Equipment to be in good repair and proper adjustment. New Violation. Correct By: 12/08/2023
Fan guard missing in walk-in cooler. New Violation. Correct By: 12/08/2023
The non-food contact surfaces of the interior of refrigeration units and flour bin have an accumulation of dust, dirt, food residue, and other debris. New Violation. Correct By: 12/08/2023
The outside dumpster is not covered. Receptacles and waste handling units for refuse, recyclables, and returnables shall be kept covered. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 11/24/2023

The following was observed in poor repair: 1. Various parts of ceiling in kitchen 2. Ceiling in restroom 3. Floors in Walk-in Cooler 4. Floor and wall junctures in the walk-in cooler 5. Tiles near back door The physical facilities must be maintained in good repair. New Violation. Correct By: 12/08/2023

The following has an accumulation of soil residue and food debris: 1. kitchen hoods 2. floors underneath equipment and shelving 3. Vents in kitchen The physical facilities shall be cleaned as often as necessary to keep them clean. New Violation. Correct By: 12/08/2023

Unnecessary and/or non-functional equipment or items were observed in the storage area. Establishments shall be kept free of unnecessary and/or non-functional equipment and litter to prevent harborage conditions. New Violation. Correct By: 12/08/2023
Exterior of establishment was observed with leaf litter and trash. Area to be maintained clean and free of litter to prevent harborage conditions for pests. New Violation. Correct By: 12/08/2023
